title: C919 E-TRAS — TR_Inhibited blocks deploy chain
description: Same pullback profile as nominal, but the A/C-bus injects TR_Inhibited:stuck_on at t=1.0s (just before SW1 window would close). Expected: CMD2 and CMD3 never latch, fadec_deploy_command stays false, TR position stays 0 — state machine cannot leave S1_GROUND_ARMED.

events.note: A/C bus inhibits TR before SW1 window closes
TRA inside SW1 window with MLG_WOW=1 → CMD2 SHOULD fire but tr_inhibited blocks it
deploy must never fire under persistent inhibit
deploy never reaches triggerable state because enable upstream is dead
